docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,008.92 FILED BY GIMPELEVICH, DAVID J. CHAMPION, SUSAN L. AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. FILED BY DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. FILED BY DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** BY REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS DENIED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS DAVID J. GIMPELEVICH AND SUSAN L. CHAMPION ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION IS PRESENT THROUGH ELIZABETH H. MOORE. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIMPELEVICH, DAVID J. CHAMPION, SUSAN L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $175.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
